name: io.github.codespar/mcp-whatsapp-cloud
description: MCP server for WhatsApp Cloud API (Meta direct) — official Graph API integration for messages, media, and templates

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Meta system-user access token (permanent). Used as Bearer token for Graph API.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
environmentVariables.description: WhatsApp Business phone number ID registered with Meta.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: WhatsApp Business Account (WABA) ID. Used for template management.

environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_GRAPH_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: Graph API version. Defaults to v21.0. Meta bumps quarterly.
